prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科最低位次约11265→12368→15879→26495→13388，整体波动较大；2024年出现异常高位（约26495名），2025年大幅回弹至约13388名，近5年位次中枢约在13000–16000名区间；该校在内蒙古理科招生计划2021年99人、2022年97人、2023年98人、2024年107人、2025年110人，呈持续扩招趋势；2026年计划增至118人（较2025年增加8人，扩幅约7.3%），扩招使竞争面略有扩大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 华中农业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第45名，近年排名稳定在42–47名区间，属于全国中上游水平；该校近年声誉整体平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度评级为"较热"（总排名第54），短视频平台关注度中等偏上，对报考热度有一定正面支撑；第五轮学科评估中，兽医学A+、畜牧学A+、作物学A、水产A、食品科学与工程A，共5个A-及以上学科，农林特色鲜明，对相关专业报考有稳定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校计算机类、机械类等专业招生位次靠前；农林类专业热度平稳；内蒙古2026年高考考生总数约15.4万人，较2025年大幅增加（物理类估算约11.08万人，增幅约32.3%），全省竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约13388名、2026年计划扩招约7.3%、本省考生总数大幅增加（物理类+32.3%）使竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳偏正面、软科排名稳定等因素，预计2026年理科最低录取位次；预测最低位次约14072名，区间13572–14572名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能）
- 生物科学类（含生物科学国家理科基地班、生物技术国家生命科学与技术基地班）
- 光电信息科学与工程
- 机械类（含机械设计制造及其自动化、机械电子工程、自动化、机器人工程）
- 动物医学（五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 食品科学与工程类（含食品科学与工程国家卓越工程师计划、食品质量与安全、食品营养与健康）
- 智慧农业
- 动物科学（国家卓越农林人才计划）
- 植物生产类（含农学国家卓越农林人才计划、植物科学与技术、种子科学与工程、植物保护国家卓越农林人才计划）
- 工商管理类（含市场营销、人力资源管理、会计学、财务管理、工商管理）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 水产类（含水产养殖学国家卓越农林人才计划、水族科学与技术）
- 公共管理类（含土地资源管理、行政管理）
- 管理科学与工程类（含工程管理、信息管理与信息系统）
- 风景园林
- 广告学。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约14072名，区间13572–14572名。位次在区间内建议以二档专业为主力（食品科学、智慧农业、动物科学等优势学科专业），一档专业（计算机类、生物科学类、动物医学等）可作为冲刺目标，三档专业（水产类、公共管理类等）稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间上限（<13572名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业；位次接近区间下限（>14572名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum science rankings were approximately 11265 → 12368 → 15879 → 26495 → 13388, showing significant fluctuations; in 2024, an abnormally high ranking (about 26495) occurred, and in 2025, it rebounded sharply to about 13388, with the median ranking over the past 5 years around 13000–16000; the university's science enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia was 99 in 2021, 97 in 2022, 98 in 2023, 107 in 2024, and 110 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan increases to 118 (an increase of 8 from 2025, about 7.3%), and the expansion slightly broadens competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Huazhong Agricultural University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its Soft Science China University Ranking in 2026 is about 45th, with recent rankings stable in the 42–47 range, placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; the university's reputation has been generally stable in recent years, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; its Douyin heat rating is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 54th), with above-average attention on short video platforms, providing some positive support for application heat; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, veterinary medicine A+, animal science A+, crop science A, aquaculture A, and food science and engineering A, totaling 5 disciplines at A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics, offering stable attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, and electrical engineering continue to have high social popularity, with the university's computer science and mechanical majors ranking high in admissions; agricultural and forestry majors have stable popularity; in 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, a significant increase from 2025 (estimated physics category about 110,800, an increase of about 32.3%), leading to notably intensified competition across the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 13388, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 7.3%, the substantial increase in the number of local candidates (physics category +32.3%) intensifying competition, the generally positive and stable university reputation, and the stable Soft Science ranking, the predicted minimum admission ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 14072, with a range of 13572–14572.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Biological Sciences (including National Science Basic Research Base in Biological Sciences, National Life Science and Technology Base in Biotechnology)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Engineering (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Automation, Robotics Engineering)
- Veterinary Medicine (five-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Food Science and Engineering (including National Excellent Engineer Program in Food Science and Engineering, Food Quality and Safety, Food Nutrition and Health)
- Smart Agriculture
- Animal Science (National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program)
- Plant Production (including National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program in Agronomy, Plant Science and Technology, Seed Science and Engineering, National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program in Plant Protection)
- Business Administration (including Marketing, Human Resource Management, Accounting, Financial Management, Business Administration).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Aquaculture (including National Excellent Agricultural and Forestry Talent Program in Aquaculture, Aquarium Science and Technology)
- Public Administration (including Land Resource Management, Administrative Management)
- Management Science and Engineering (including Engineering Management, Information Management and Information Systems)
- Landscape Architecture
- Advertising.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 14072, with a range of 13572–14572. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Food Science, Smart Agriculture, Animal Science, etc., as advantageous discipline majors), with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Biological Sciences, Veterinary Medicine, etc.) as reach targets, and Tier 3 majors (Aquaculture, Public Administration, etc.) as safe choices. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<13572), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; for rankings near the lower limit (>14572), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety.

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约1814名、2026年计划缩招约16.7%、本省考生总数大幅增加（历史类+32.4%）使竞争加剧、学校声誉平稳等因素，预计2026年文科最低录取位次；预测最低位次约1663名，区间1418–1908名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 3101 → 1566 → 2604 → 3704 → 1814, showing significant fluctuations but an overall oscillating pattern; the baseline for 2025 is about 1814th place. The university's liberal arts enrollment plan in Inner Mongolia was 24 students in 2021, 26 in 2022, 26 in 2023, 25 in 2024, and 24 in 2025, remaining stable at 24–26 students. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 20 students (a decrease of 4 students from 2025, a reduction of about 16.7%), narrowing the competition due to fewer spots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 45th in the 2026 Soft Science ranking, with stable rankings in recent years; reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion; Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot'; no record of admission gaps. The university's liberal arts majors mainly include Economics, Business Administration, Public Administration, Sociology, and Foreign Languages and Literature. Although not directly corresponding to the university's A+ disciplines, it relies on the 211 platform for overall strong strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for Economics/Finance/Business majors is divided and cautious, Law is relatively hot, Teacher Training/Education is divided and cautious. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Inner Mongolia is about 154,000, with an estimated 43,200 in the History Category (an increase of about 32.4% from 2025), significantly intensifying competition across the province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 1814th place, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 16.7%, the substantial increase in the number of examinees in the province (History Category +32.4%) intensifying competition, and the stable reputation of the university, the predicted minimum admission ranking for liberal arts in 2026 is approximately 1663rd place, with a range of 1418–1908th place.
